# Coverage Review - 2026-07-10

## Summary
- Tooling: `go test ./... -coverprofile` / `go tool cover -func`
- Command: `go test ./... -coverprofile=cov.out && go tool cover -func=cov.out`
- Result: pass (informational — no repo-configured hard gate)
- Overall: statements 85.7%
- Patch coverage: n/a (updateapply is a wholly new package added since v0.4.4; no prior baseline to diff changed lines against — see per-function breakdown below instead)
- Baseline: v0.4.4 85.9% → HEAD 85.7% (delta -0.2%)
- Mutation score: n/a (not run — no repo mutation tool configured, `--mutation` not requested)
- Test quality: not measured this run (coverage-focused gate check)
- Gate: threshold=80 (default, no repo gate found); overall and new-package coverage both clear it

## Metrics
| Area | Lines | Notes |
|---|---:|---|
| `updatecheck/updateapply` (new pkg) | 83.9% | new in this release; pulls repo average down slightly since it's below the 85.9% prior average |
| `updatecheck/updateapply.Reexec` | 0.0% | replaces the running process (`execve`), cannot run under `go test`; see finding |
| repo total | 85.7% | vs. baseline 85.9% (v0.4.4) |

## Findings
- [ ] **[Coverage/REGRESSION] Overall coverage dipped 85.9% → 85.7% vs v0.4.4**
  - **Status quo:** Total statement coverage dropped 0.2 points since the last release. The new `updatecheck/updateapply` package (83.9%) is the only material change and sits below the prior repo average, pulling the total down slightly.
  - **Likely cause:** New package shipped with strong but not complete coverage (Apply 88.2%, download 84.6%, downloadToTemp 82.4%, atomicSwap 86.7%); `Reexec` (0.0%) is untestable in-process (it calls `syscall.Exec`/replaces the running binary).
  - **Proposed solution:** Two options: (a) accept — the drop is marginal (-0.2pp), well above the 80% default bar, and driven by a legitimately hard-to-cover process-replacement function; or (b) add a couple of guard-clause/error-path tests in `download`/`downloadToTemp` to close the gap before release.
  - **Uncovered:** `updatecheck/updateapply/updateapply.go:193` (`download`), `updatecheck/updateapply/updateapply.go:217` (`downloadToTemp`)
  - **Effort/Impact:** Low effort / low impact

## Non-issues
- `updatecheck/updateapply/updateapply.go:123` (`Reexec`, 0.0%) — replaces the running process via `syscall.Exec`; cannot execute under `go test` without exiting the test binary. Not a real gap.

## Next step
This is a release-gate check (`06-gh-prerelease`), not an ad-hoc coverage audit — see the prerelease gate report for the pass/block decision.
